CheckTitle: Linode Cloud Firewall status is enabled
Description: Linode Cloud Firewalls are checked to verify if their status is enabled.
Risk: A disabled firewall does not enforce configured network filtering controls, increasing exposure to unwanted traffic.

Code.Other:
1. Log in to the Linode Cloud Manager
2. Navigate to Firewalls
3. Click on the Enable button from the options corresponding to the firewall whose status you would like to update

Recommendation.Text: Enable Linode Cloud Firewalls to ensure network filtering controls are actively enforced.
